siteDescription: Darwin.Web public storefront and member portal foundation with a theme-isolated, CMS-aware shell.
homeMetaDescription: Composable Darwin storefront home built from reusable web parts on top of live CMS and catalog contracts.
cmsIndexMetaDescription: Published storefront content pages delivered from the public CMS contracts.
cmsFallbackMetaDescription: Published CMS content delivered from Darwin.WebApi.
publicApiNotFoundMessage: The requested content is currently unavailable.
publicApiHttpErrorMessage: Part of the storefront content could not be loaded right now.
publicApiInvalidPayloadMessage: Part of the storefront content is currently returning unreadable data.
publicApiNetworkErrorMessage: Part of the storefront content is temporarily unavailable.
cmsDetailWarningsMessage: The page fetch reported status "{status}". The storefront is rendering the content it could resolve.
cmsContentNavigationDescription: Published CMS pages are surfaced here through the same public contract instead of theme-only hard-coded sidebars.
cmsOnThisPageDescription: The storefront now derives section navigation from the published CMS HTML instead of leaving long-form content as one unstructured block.
cmsReadinessDescription: This page is currently operating at a {status} level for public discovery based on live metadata, structure, and navigation signals.
cmsReferencePositionValue: Page {current} of {total} in the current published set
cmsReferencePositionFallback: This page was loaded, but its position could not be derived from the current published set.
cmsFollowUpDescription: CMS detail should not be a dead end. Keep the adjacent storefront paths visible from the same content surface.
cmsAdjacentPageFallback: Published CMS page available for adjacent storefront reading.
cmsPreviousPageEmptyMessage: There is no previous published CMS page in the current storefront navigation set.
cmsNextPageEmptyMessage: There is no next published CMS page in the current storefront navigation set.
cmsRelatedPagesDegradedMessage: The public CMS listing endpoint returned status "{status}" while building this sidebar.
cmsRelatedPagesEmptyMessage: No additional published CMS pages are available for related navigation right now.
cmsIndexDescription: This route consumes the public CMS page list directly. It is meant to validate that the storefront sees the same published content truth that WebAdmin manages.
cmsIndexDegradedTitle: CMS listing is running in degraded mode.
cmsIndexDegradedMessage: The public CMS pages endpoint returned status "{status}". This failure stays visible in the UI instead of collapsing into a silent placeholder.
cmsVisibleSearchInfoMessage: This search runs through the published CMS pages in the current result window. Readiness and priority lenses can then refine the result further.
cmsVisibleSearchFilteredMessage: The CMS search "{query}" is active. The current result window and review lenses are now scoped to that query.
cmsVisibleStateReadyMessage: This browse lens keeps only CMS pages from the current search or listing query that already expose both meta title and meta description for stronger public discovery.
cmsVisibleStateNeedsAttentionMessage: This browse lens keeps only CMS pages from the current search or listing query that still need discovery attention because meta title or meta description is missing.
cmsVisibleSortTitleAscendingMessage: This browse lens now prioritizes the current CMS query alphabetically, so review stays orderly inside the result window.
cmsVisibleSortReadyFirstMessage: This browse lens now prioritizes discovery-ready pages inside the current CMS query, so stronger public-content candidates are easier to review.
cmsVisibleSortAttentionFirstMessage: This browse lens now prioritizes pages needing metadata attention inside the current CMS query, so content debt is easier to review.
cmsMetadataFocusMissingTitleMessage: This browse lens keeps only CMS pages from the current search or listing query that are still missing a meta title.
cmsMetadataFocusMissingDescriptionMessag: This browse lens keeps only CMS pages from the current search or listing query that are still missing a meta description.
cmsMetadataFocusMissingBothMessage: This browse lens keeps only CMS pages from the current search or listing query that are still missing both meta title and meta description.
cmsResultSummaryMessage: Showing published pages {pageStart} to {pageEnd} of {totalItems}. You are on CMS page {currentPage} of {totalPages}.
cmsResultSummaryFilteredMessage: Showing {visibleCount} visible pages out of {loadedCount} loaded on CMS page {currentPage} for the current CMS search or browse lens, with {totalItems} published pages available overall.
cmsDetailRouteSummaryMessage: Page status: {status}. Related-navigation status: {relatedStatus}. {relatedCount} pages are currently available in the local related set.
cmsGroupingMessage: The CMS index now groups the currently loaded published pages by their visible title initials so the route reads like a browsable content set instead of one undifferentiated wall.
cmsGroupingFilteredMessage: The current CMS search or browse lens also narrows these CMS groups, so the storefront keeps the grouping honest to the exact pages shown right now.
cmsIndexReadinessMessage: This CMS window is currently operating at a {status} level for public discovery review, based on visible ready pages, attention pages, and reading support coverage.
cmsIndexReadinessAttentionValue: {count} visible pages still needing metadata attention
cmsIndexReadinessSupportValue: {groupCount} visible groups and {followUpCount} reading follow-up pages
cmsIndexReviewMessage: {readyCount} visible pages are discovery-ready and {attentionCount} still need attention, so this CMS window can move directly into the strongest next review set.
cmsIndexReviewMetaTitleValue: {count} visible pages still missing a meta title
cmsIndexReviewMetaDescriptionValue: {count} visible pages still missing a meta description
cmsIndexReviewMissingBothValue: {count} visible pages still missing both meta title and meta description
cmsIndexReviewMissingTitleMessage: {count} visible pages are still missing a meta title in this result window.
cmsIndexReviewMissingDescriptionMessage: {count} visible pages are still missing a meta description in this result window.
cmsIndexReviewMissingBothMessage: {count} visible pages are still missing both metadata fields in this result window.
cmsIndexReviewTargetBothMessage: This visible page is still missing both meta title and meta description, so it is the strongest current discovery-attention target.
cmsIndexReviewTargetMetaTitleMessage: This visible page is still missing a meta title, so discovery review should start here.
cmsIndexReviewTargetMetaDescriptionMessa: This visible page is still missing a meta description, so discovery review should start here.
cmsIndexReviewTargetsFallback: No visible CMS page currently needs metadata follow-up inside this review window.
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyMessage: This CMS index can now hold the current browse window, the next review move, and the strongest storefront continuation as one explicit content journey instead of only a list and review rail.
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyCurrentTitle: Stay inside the active CMS browse window
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyCurrentDescrip: {count} visible published pages are active on CMS page {page}, so this route can keep the current content window intact while the next action is chosen.
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyReviewTitle: Move straight into the strongest review set
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyReviewDescript: The current CMS browse window can hand off directly into the strongest metadata-review move instead of making the team rebuild the right lens by hand.
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyStorefrontCart: Continue from content into the active basket
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyStorefrontProd: {product} is the strongest storefront continuation right now.
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyStorefrontCate: {category} is the strongest browse lane right now.
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyStorefrontFall: Continue from CMS into the storefront entry surface
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyStorefrontCart: {itemCount} live cart lines already exist at {total}, so this CMS window can move directly into the active basket.
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyStorefrontProd: This visible product is currently the strongest commerce continuation at {price}.
cmsIndexCompositionJourneyStorefrontFall: No stronger commerce continuation is visible right now, so the CMS window falls back to the broader storefront browse surface.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapMessage: The active CMS window can now reopen its browse set, its review set, the strongest reading route, and the strongest storefront continuation as one explicit action map.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapCurrentTitle: Return to the current CMS browse window
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapCurrentDescri: {count} visible pages are active on CMS page {page}.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapReviewTitle: Open the strongest next review set
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapReviewDescrip: Keep the visible metadata-review move explicit from the CMS index itself.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapContentTitle: {title} currently leads the visible reading path.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapContentFallba: No single CMS page currently leads the visible reading path.
The storefront falls back to the broader CMS index when no single visible page should anchor the next reading move.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapStorefrontCar: The active basket is the strongest storefront handoff.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapStorefrontPro: {product} is the strongest storefront product handoff.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapStorefrontCat: {category} is the strongest storefront browse handoff.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapStorefrontFal: Use the storefront browse entry as the current handoff.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapStorefrontCar: {itemCount} live cart lines already exist at {total}, so this CMS route can hand off straight into the basket.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapStorefrontPro: This product is currently live at {price} and leads the next commerce move from the CMS window.
cmsIndexCompositionRouteMapStorefrontFal: No stronger storefront handoff is visible right now, so this route falls back to the broader storefront browse surface.
cmsReviewWindowMessage: This detail route now hands review back into the strongest CMS window for its current {status} state, so content review can continue from the right published set instead of restarting from the default index.
cmsNextReviewTargetBothMessage: The next strongest visible CMS target still needs both meta title and meta description, so review can continue immediately from this detail route.
cmsNextReviewTargetMetaTitleMessage: The next strongest visible CMS target still needs a meta title, so review can continue immediately from this detail route.
cmsNextReviewTargetMetaDescriptionMessag: The next strongest visible CMS target still needs a meta description, so review can continue immediately from this detail route.
cmsNextReviewTargetFallback: No other visible CMS page currently needs metadata follow-up in this review set.
cmsReviewQueueMessage: This page is currently {currentStatus}. There are {remainingCount} more published pages in the visible review queue.
cmsReviewQueueBothMessage: Meta title and meta description still need attention.
cmsReviewQueueFallback: No more visible CMS review targets remain in this queue.
cmsGroupingLargestSetMessage: The largest visible title group is "{key}" with {count} published pages in the current result window.
cmsGroupingLargestSetFallback: No visible CMS pages are available to derive group size right now.
cmsFollowUpRailMessage: Use the next visible pages as a lightweight reading rail from the same published result window.
cmsFollowUpRailFallback: No additional visible CMS pages are available for a follow-up reading rail right now.
cmsCrossSurfaceMessage: Public CMS browsing should hand off cleanly into the rest of the storefront system, not behave like an isolated content island.
cmsCrossSurfaceHomeDescription: Go back to the composed storefront entry surface to review the broader CMS, catalog, and member system state.
cmsCrossSurfaceCatalogDescription: Carry content discovery into product browsing through the same public front-office shell.
cmsCrossSurfaceAccountDescription: Continue from public content into sign-in, self-service, or the authenticated member portal.
cmsCatalogWindowMessage: The storefront can hand off this CMS surface into {categoryCount} live catalog categories. Category feed status: {categoriesStatus}.
cmsCatalogWindowFallbackDescription: Published category lane available through the live public catalog contracts.
cmsCatalogWindowEmptyMessage: No live catalog categories are available for this CMS handoff right now. Category feed status: {status}.
cmsProductsWindowMessage: The storefront can also move from CMS into {productCount} live product routes. Product feed status: {productsStatus}.
cmsProductsWindowOfferDescription: This is the strongest visible offer right now at {savingsPercent}% savings, currently available for {price}.
cmsProductsWindowFallbackDescription: Published product available through the live public catalog contracts.
cmsProductsWindowEmptyMessage: No live products are available for this CMS handoff right now. Product feed status: {status}.
cmsCartWindowMessage: {itemCount} live cart lines already exist at {total}, so published content can move the shopper directly into the active purchase flow.
cmsCartWindowFallback: No live cart is currently visible, so this CMS route stays focused on content, category, and product discovery.
cmsCampaignWindowMessage: This CMS surface can already hand off into {categoryCount} visible category lanes and {productCount} visible product opportunities, so content can sell through stronger live storefront stories.
cmsCampaignCategoryTitle: {category} is ready as the next browse campaign.
cmsCampaignCategoryFallbackDescription: This visible category lane is already strong enough to continue the CMS story into storefront browse.
cmsCampaignProductTitle: {product} is ready as the next buying story.
cmsCampaignProductDescription: {campaignLabel}: this visible product currently carries a savings signal of {savingsPercent}% and a live storefront price of {price}.
cmsCampaignProductFallbackDescription: {campaignLabel}: this visible product is already live at {price} and ready for the next buying move.
cmsCampaignPromotionLaneSectionMessage: This CMS surface can now hand content off into direct merchandising windows instead of only generic browse stories.
cmsCampaignPromotionLaneFallbackTitle: {lane} currently has no visible anchor product.
cmsCampaignPromotionLaneDescription: {lane}: {count} visible products currently qualify for this lane. The current lead price is {price}.
cmsCampaignPromotionLaneFallbackDescript: {lane} currently has no visible products, so this merchandising lane stays visible as an explicit gap.
cmsCompositionJourneyMessage: This CMS detail can now compose reading, review, and commerce handoff as one explicit flow instead of leaving content as an isolated long-form page.
cmsCompositionJourneyReadDescription: This page currently carries {sectionCount} visible sections across about {minutes} reading minutes, so the storefront can hand the reader into the strongest next section instead of a flat HTML block.
cmsCompositionJourneyReviewFallbackTitle: This page is the current review anchor.
cmsCompositionJourneyReviewDescription: Keep the active CMS review window alive so metadata and discovery work can continue from the right published set.
cmsCompositionJourneyReviewFallbackDescr: No stronger next review target is visible right now, so this page remains the current review anchor.
cmsCompositionJourneyCommerceCartDescrip: {itemCount} live cart lines already exist at {total}, so this CMS route can continue directly into the active purchase flow.
cmsCompositionJourneyCommerceProductDesc: {product} is the strongest visible product continuation right now at {price}.
cmsCompositionJourneyCommerceCategoryDes: {category} is the strongest visible category lane to continue this content story into browse.
cmsCompositionJourneyCommerceFallbackDes: No stronger live commerce target is visible right now, so this route falls back to the catalog entry surface.
cmsCompositionRouteMapMessage: This page can now reopen the surrounding published set, the strongest browse lane, and the strongest live offer as one explicit content-driven action map.
cmsCompositionRouteMapPublishedTitle: Return to the visible CMS window
cmsCompositionRouteMapPublishedDescripti: {count} visible published pages are currently available in the active CMS window.
cmsCompositionRouteMapCategoryTitle: {category} is ready as the next browse lane.
cmsCompositionRouteMapCategoryFallbackTi: No stronger category lane is visible right now.
cmsCompositionRouteMapCategoryFallbackDe: The storefront falls back to the broader catalog surface when no stronger category lane is visible from this content route.
cmsCompositionRouteMapProductTitle: {product} is ready as the next buying route.
cmsCompositionRouteMapProductFallbackTit: No stronger product follow-up is visible right now.
cmsCompositionRouteMapProductDescription: This visible product is currently live at {price} and ready to continue the CMS story into a concrete buying route.
cmsCompositionRouteMapProductFallbackDes: The storefront falls back to the broader catalog surface when no stronger live offer is visible from this content route.
cmsCampaignWindowEmptyMessage: No commerce campaigns are currently derivable from this CMS surface. Category status: {categoriesStatus}. Product status: {productsStatus}.
cmsCardDescriptionFallback: Published CMS page available through the public storefront content contract.
cmsNoPagesMessage: No published CMS pages were returned for this page of the public content surface.
cmsPaginationMessage: Move across the published CMS result windows while preserving the current CMS search and browse lens.

menuMessages.emptyMenu: Public CMS menu "{menuName}" returned no top-level links.
menuMessages.notFound: Public CMS menu "{menuName}" was not found.
menuMessages.fallbackDefault: Main navigation is currently rendering from the emergency fallback because the CMS menu fetch returned status "{menuStatus}".
